title: carex divisa subsp. chaetophylla
intro: Carex divisa subsp. chaetophylla, also known as a type of sedge plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Carex divisa subsp. chaetophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce swelling and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component of various herbal formulas.
